plain_english.Add organizer self-registration (sign up: Let organizers sign up with just their email
plain_english.Integrate Stripe for payments — tiered p: Offer a few different paid plans through Stripe
plain_english.Add Stripe Checkout for one-time competi: Let organizers pay for a single event, or subscribe for the season
plain_english.Add billing dashboard for organizers (vi: Let organizers view invoices and manage their subscription
plain_english.Add usage tracking (number of competitio: Track how much organizers are using the app
plain_english.Add organizer onboarding flow (create ac: A guided setup: create an account, pick a plan, pay, and run your first competition
plain_english.Build a landing page (separate from the: A public website explaining what the app does, pricing, and stories from real customers
plain_english.Add demo mode — let potential customers: Let people try the app before signing up
plain_english.Add documentation / help center for orga: A help center that walks organizers through setting up a competition and adding judges
plain_english.Add in-app support chat or contact form: A way to reach support directly from the app
plain_english.Add Terms of Service and Privacy Policy: Terms of service and a privacy policy
plain_english.Add status page (upptime or similar) so: A status page so organizers can check the app is working during events
plain_english.Set up transactional email (welcome emai: Automatic emails for welcome messages, password resets, and competition reminders
plain_english.Add social proof — case studies from rea: Real stories from competitions that used the app
plain_english.SEO basics — meta tags ✓, sitemap ✓ (sub: Make the app easier to find in search results
plain_english.Mobile app or PWA (installable on judge: An app judges can install on their phones that works without a signal
plain_english.PDF export for final results and score s: Export final results and score sheets as a PDF
plain_english.White-label option (organizer's logo and: Let organizers use their own logo and branding
plain_english.API access for integrations with other c: Connect with other competition management tools organizers already use
plain_english.Multi-language support if expanding beyo: Support for other languages as the app grows beyond the US
plain_english.Judge reputation/history tracking across: Track a judge's history and reputation across competitions
plain_english.Automated competition setup wizard (walk: A step-by-step wizard that walks organizers through setting up a competition

plain_english.Children's Product Safety Improvement Ac: Generate the Children's Product Certificate (CPC) required under CPSIA for any product made for kids 12 and under.
plain_english.**Add Product** — Register the children': Add the product: SKU, manufacturer, country of origin, and the age group it's made for.
plain_english.**Upload Lab Test Report** — Attach the: Upload the test report from a CPSC-accepted lab and attach it to the product.
plain_english.**Complete CPC Form** — Fill in all 7 re: Fill in the certificate: product description, the safety standards it meets, lab details, test and manufacture dates and locations, importer info, and the tracking label.
plain_english.**Preview & Generate PDF** — Review the: Review the finished certificate, then generate it as a PDF ready to file or share with customs.
plain_english.Product creation (children's product typ: Add a children's product to the system
plain_english.CPC 7-field data entry form: Fill out the certificate's required fields
plain_english.CPC preview (read-only view): Preview the certificate before it's finalized
plain_english.CPC PDF generation (pdf-lib): Generate the finished certificate as a PDF
plain_english.Lab test document upload + linking: Upload the lab's test report and attach it to the product
plain_english.CPC status tracking (draft -> issued ->: Track whether a certificate is a draft, issued, or replaced by a newer one
plain_english.CPSIA product list with CPC status badge: See every CPSIA product and its certificate status at a glance
plain_english.Pre-populated CPSC safety standards (AST: Choose from a built-in list of CPSC safety standards, including ASTM F963
plain_english.Importer info pre-fill from business pro: Importer details fill in automatically from the company's profile
plain_english.Server-side cohort enforcement (`require: Only show each company the rules that apply to what they import
plain_english.Ownership checks on CPC endpoints (IDOR: Make sure each company can only see its own certificates
plain_english.CPSC e-Filing CSV export (`GET /api/cpsi: Export certificate data in the format CPSC e-Filing expects
plain_english.Consumer goods product creation form (co: Add a general consumer product and only see the compliance rules relevant to it
plain_english.CPSC e-Filing live submission to ACE *(d: Submit e-Filing data directly to CPSC's system once the July 2026 mandate takes effect
plain_english.CPC version history / supersession chain: See the full history of a certificate, including every earlier version it replaced
plain_english.California Proposition 65 — assess produ: Check products against California's Prop 65 chemical list and generate the required warning label.
plain_english.**Add Product** — Register the consumer: Add the product: materials, manufacturer, and country of origin.
plain_english.**Chemical Assessment** — Answer: does t: Answer whether the product needs a Prop 65 warning — yes, no, or not sure. A "no" answer is recorded as the official assessment.
plain_english.**Identify Chemicals & Warning Type** —: Pick the chemicals present from a built-in list, how a person could be exposed to them, and whether the warning is for cancer, reproductive harm, or both.
plain_english.**Generate Warning Label** — Choose shor: Choose a short-form or long-form label, preview it at packaging and shelf-tag size, then download it as a PDF.
plain_english.Product creation for Prop 65 module: Add a product for a Prop 65 review
plain_english.Yes/No/Not Sure assessment flow: Record a yes / no / not-sure warning assessment
plain_english.Chemical multi-select with CAS numbers a: Pick from a built-in list of chemicals, with reference numbers and explanations
plain_english.Warning type selection (cancer / reprodu: Choose whether the warning covers cancer, reproductive harm, or both
plain_english.Exposure route checkboxes: Note how a person could be exposed to the chemical
plain_english.Safe harbor compliance checkbox with exp: A checkbox confirming the product meets the safe-harbor exposure limit, with an explanation
plain_english.Short-form and long-form label text gene: Generate the wording for a short-form or long-form warning label
plain_english.Label preview (packaging + shelf tag siz: Preview the label at packaging and shelf-tag size
plain_english.Label PDF generation: Generate the warning label as a PDF
plain_english.Server-side chemicals list endpoint (/ap: Look up the current list of Prop 65 chemicals
plain_english.Prop 65 product list with disclosure sta: See every Prop 65 product and its warning status at a glance
plain_english.Server-side cohort enforcement (`require: Only show each company the rules that apply to what they import
plain_english.Ownership checks on disclosure endpoints: Make sure each company can only see its own disclosure records
plain_english.Prop 65 60-day notice CRUD with cure-dea: Track a 60-day notice of violation and its cure deadline
plain_english.OEHHA list auto-update — weekly cron syn: The list of regulated chemicals updates automatically each week, and flags any of a company's disclosures affected by a change
plain_english.Tailored warning label format *(deferred: Warning labels tailored to the specific product
plain_english.Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances — st: Answer a guided questionnaire about PFAS chemicals in a product and see which state regulations apply.
plain_english.**Add Product** — Register the product w: Add the product: category, materials, and manufacturer details.
plain_english.**PFAS Assessment** — Answer: does this: Answer whether the product contains PFAS — yes, no, or unknown. A "no" answer completes a certification; an "unknown" answer comes with guidance.
plain_english.**Component Disclosure** — For each PFAS: For each PFAS-containing part: its name, the specific substance, how much it contains, and what it's used for (such as water resistance or non-stick coating).
plain_english.**Regulatory Scope** — Select states whe: Select which states the product is sold in, and the applicable state regulations are identified automatically.
plain_english.**Generate Disclosure Report** — Generat: Generate a PDF disclosure report with the component list, applicable regulations, and the company's certification.
plain_english.Product creation for PFAS module: Add a product for a PFAS review
plain_english.3-step questionnaire wizard (assessment: A guided, step-by-step questionnaire: assessment, then components, then regulations
plain_english.Yes/No/Unknown assessment with guidance: Record a yes / no / unknown assessment, with guidance for unknown cases
plain_english.Dynamic component entry (add/remove rows: Add or remove PFAS-containing components as needed
plain_english.8-state regulation database (CA, ME, NY,: A built-in database of state PFAS regulations across eight states
plain_english.Auto-populate regulatory basis from sele: Applicable regulations fill in automatically based on the states selected
plain_english.Disclosure report preview (HTML): Preview the disclosure report before generating it
plain_english.Disclosure report PDF generation: Generate the disclosure report as a PDF
plain_english.PFAS product list with status badges: See every PFAS product and its disclosure status at a glance
plain_english.Server-side cohort enforcement (`require: Only show each company the rules that apply to what they import
plain_english.PFAS state-report PDF for 6 states (`/ap: Generate a state-specific disclosure report for six states
plain_english.Maine DEP annual report CSV export (`/ap: Export the annual report Maine's environmental agency requires
plain_english.Expanded PFAS substance database (EPA Co: Search a database of roughly 8,380 known PFAS substances while filling out a disclosure
plain_english.Manufacturer PFAS declaration request fl: Ask a supplier to fill out their own PFAS questionnaire, and their answers attach directly to the requesting company's product
plain_english.FSVP: Foreign supplier verification (FSVP, for food importers)
plain_english.Foreign Supplier Verification Program (2: Required for US food importers: verify that foreign suppliers produce food that meets US safety standards.
plain_english.**Add Food Product** — Register the impo: Add the imported food: supplier, country of origin, and food category.
plain_english.**Hazard Analysis** — Identify known or: Identify possible hazards — biological, chemical, physical, or radiological — and rate how severe and how likely each one is.
plain_english.**Supplier Verification Activity** — Cho: Based on how severe the hazard is, choose how the supplier will be verified: an onsite audit, sampling and testing, or a records review, and how often.
plain_english.**Qualified Individual** — Assign a QI (: Assign a Qualified Individual — someone trained in-house, or an outside firm — to carry out the verification.
plain_english.**Inspection Bundle** — Generate a per-s: Generate a complete package of FSVP records for a supplier, ready for an FDA inspection or a customs entry.
plain_english.Food-cohort product creation: Add a food product for an FSVP review
plain_english.FDA proxy (enforcement + adverse events): Look up FDA enforcement actions and adverse-event reports
plain_english.Per-supplier FSVP inspection package exp: Export a complete FSVP inspection package for a single supplier
plain_english.Hazard analysis CRUD (per-product, 4 haz: Record a hazard analysis for a product across four hazard categories
plain_english.Supplier verification activity schedulin: Schedule and track supplier verification activities
plain_english.Qualified Individual roster + assignment: Maintain a roster of Qualified Individuals and who's assigned where
plain_english.FSVP record CRUD with ownership scoping: Each company can only see and manage its own FSVP records
plain_english.Compliance Alerts integration for overdu: Overdue verifications show up alongside a company's other compliance alerts
plain_english.Hazard analysis / verification / QI form: Simple forms for recording a hazard analysis, a supplier verification, or a Qualified Individual
plain_english.Product-detail Compliance tab integratio: See a product's FSVP status — hazards, supplier verifications, assigned Qualified Individuals — right on the product page
plain_english.FSVP inspection prep checklist (per-prod: A readiness checklist for each product showing whether it's ready for inspection, with red/yellow/green status across hazard analysis, supplier verification, assigned Qualified Individual, and supporting documents
plain_english.Foreign supplier directory with reusable: A directory of foreign suppliers that can be reused across products
plain_english.Concurrent-edit handling / optimistic lo: Support for more than one person editing FSVP records at the same time
plain_english.European Union product safety & chemical: Compliance for products sold in the European Union: REACH chemical safety, SVHC high-concern substance declarations, RoHS for products with electrical components, and general EU product safety rules.
plain_english.**Add Product** — Register EU-export pro: Add the product being exported to the EU: materials, manufacturer, and country of origin.
plain_english.**Material Declaration** — List all mate: List every material used — plastics, paints, adhesives, plating solutions, coatings.
plain_english.**REACH Assessment** — Confirm REACH com: Confirm REACH compliance for each material and upload the required SVHC declarations.
plain_english.**Supply Chain Documentation** — Upload: Upload a Material Safety Data Sheet for each chemical treatment, and optionally track a bill of materials.
plain_english.**Compliance Readiness** — Generate REAC: Generate the REACH certificate and SVHC summary for a customs or compliance audit.
plain_english.`eu_products` category or category exten: Flag a product as an EU export
plain_english.`eu_compliance` module (cohort enforceme: Only show each company the EU rules that apply to what they export
plain_english.Schema: `eu_reach_declarations`, `eu_svh: Store REACH declarations, SVHC assertions, and material components for each product
plain_english.EuComplianceService (CRUD, ownership, mo: Manage EU compliance records for a product
plain_english.`/api/eu/*` routes (6-10 endpoints: prod: Manage EU products, declarations, SVHC assertions, and materials
plain_english.`/eu-compliance` page (product list + st: A dedicated EU compliance page listing products and their status
plain_english.REACH compliance PDF generation (declara: Generate a REACH certificate and SVHC summary as a PDF
plain_english.Compliance alerts: overdue declarations,: Get alerted to overdue declarations, missing SVHC assertions, or gaps in material sourcing info
plain_english.Cross-linking: product detail ↔ EU compl: Jump between a product's page and its EU compliance record
plain_english.MSDS document type support (Prop65 + PFA: Attach a Material Safety Data Sheet to a product, the same way Prop 65 and PFAS already support
plain_english.Multi-country product support (same prod: Support products sold in more than one country, each with its own regional requirements
plain_english.International framework: country-scoped: A general framework for matching a product to the right rules and paperwork by country
plain_english.Canada CCPSA compliance (similar to US C: Compliance support for Canada, similar to the US CPSC process
plain_english.Tiered rollout: v1 = EU only, v2 = count: Roll out gradually: EU first, then let a company choose its countries, then match countries to where the product actually ships
